creator: armin@frozen-zone.org
text:
I've just updated the firmware of my SSDs (Corsair Force 3) to the most 
recent version (1 week old - 1.3.3) and the problem is no longer 
reproducable.

Sadly there is no firmware update for the Samsung drives - however - 
that is a different story and not a FreeBSD problem.

Thanks for the help and time!
